name: Spectral Strike
description: You conjure a spectral hand that lashes out at an enemy. Make a ranged spell attack against a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 force damage and must make a Strength saving throw or be pushed 5 feet away from you.
notes: Primary shape: ranged spell attack for 1d6 force damage
On hit: target makes Strength save or is pushed 5 feet — push mechanic pending engine support
